intended_use: MICSI-RMT is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head MRI.
intended_use_full: MICSI-RMT is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in MRI images. It can be used to reduce image noise for head MRI.
target_condition: Image noise in head MRI scans
ground_truth: Expert neuroradiologist raters (blinded) using Likert scale ratings for qualitative assessment; quantitative metrics based on standard diffusion and functional MRI analysis
other_metrics: Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) change: ≥5% improvement; fMRI activation z-scores improved from 3.01 to 3.64 in Broca's region and 2.80 to 3.41 in Wernicke's region; dMRI standard deviation reduction: MD from 0.16 to 0.075, FA from 0.09 to 0.069; Qualitative image quality and artifact presence ratings: mean Likert score ≥3 on both metrics
